testcase.classname: TechEMS Employee Management - Full Navigation Flow
testcase.name: Admin logs in and navigates to Employee Details
testcase.system-out: Given I open the TechEMS application........................................passed When I select the Admin Portal..............................................passed And I enter admin username "admin" and password "admin123"..................passed And I click Sign In.........................................................passed Then I should land on the Admin Dashboard...................................passed When I navigate to the Employees page.......................................passed Then the Employee Details page should load..................................passed And the employee search bar should be visible...............................passed When I open the first employee details......................................passed Then the employee detail modal should appear................................passed

testcase.classname: TechEMS Employee Management - Full Navigation Flow
testcase.name: Employee logs in and browses their Dashboard and Profile
testcase.system-out: Given I open the TechEMS application........................................passed When I select the Employee Portal...........................................passed And I enter employee username "asbar" and password "emp123".................passed And I click Sign In.........................................................passed Then I should land on the Employee Dashboard................................passed And the attendance summary card should be visible...........................passed And the salary info card should be visible..................................passed When I navigate to My Profile...............................................passed Then the profile details page should load...................................passed
